name: skill-creator
description: Create new Claude Code skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill quality through evals and benchmarks. Use when the user says things like "create a skill", "turn this into a skill", "make a skill for X", "write a SKILL.md", "run evals on my skill", "benchmark my skill", "optimize my skill description", "improve triggering", or "test my skill". Also use when the user has a workflow or conversation they want to capture as a reusable skill. Do not use for writing CLAUDE.md files, creating plugins, or general prompt engineering unrelated to skills.
